violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. - Per PIC application was submitted one week prior to this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment (slicer) was observed with a food residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Per PIC slicer is not in use and will be placed in their garage storage unit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
The lighting located above the salad station was not in good repair. Per PIC light fixture needs to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024
Inadequate lighting observed in the kitchen. Establishment shall replace missing light bulb above the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
Establishment is lacking an allergen statement on the menu. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must register a ServSafe certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager (a RI license). -Application provided to establishment at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. -Employee Health Policy and Agreement provided to establishment at the time of this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. -In addition, employee observed eating in the food prep area. Designated area for employees to eat reviewed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
Metal cups were observed in the hand-washing sink in bar area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
Shell stock tags were missing the date of last shellfish sold. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

The quaternary sanitizer dispenser observed at 100 ppm at the time of this inspection. Upon further investigation, hot water for the sanitizer dispenser observed at 148 degrees F. which exceeded the temperature requirement to be effective for the quaternary sanitizer. -Establishment will manually set up their sanitizer solution. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC put can opener in 3 bay to clean, rinse and sanitize during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. -Staff moved the medicine during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

Establishment observed dehydrating jalepenos, oranges, limes, and lemons at the time of this inspection. -Establishment is not approved by RIDOH Center for Food Protection to perform this special food process. -Establishment to discontinue dehydrating until a variance and HACCP Plan are submitted and approved by RIDOH Center for Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the front and back entrance, observed open. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

The condensate from the salad refrigeration unit is draining into the bottom shelf of the unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. -Service must be contacted. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024
Inadequate lighting observed in the kitchen. Establishment must replace to brighter bulbs. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024
